name: workflow-mcp
description: Claude-compatible dynamic workflow loader and provider-neutral execution runtime.

scripts.build: npm run generate:metadata && node scripts/clean-dist.mjs && tsc
scripts.test: npm run build && vitest run --project core && vitest run --project system && vitest run --project corpus
scripts.test:core: npm run build && vitest run --project core
scripts.test:system: npm run build && vitest run --project system
scripts.test:live: npm run build && vitest run --config vitest.live.config.ts --passWithNoTests
scripts.test:soak: npm run build && vitest run --config vitest.soak.config.ts
scripts.check: npm run test:contract && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run test:package
